description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house surrounded by a white privacy fence and set on a green lawn. The house features a flat roof and a simple, clean facade with large rectangular windows on the upper floor and a single main door on the ground level. The backyard includes a patio area with a large umbrella, a hammock, and a hot tub, suggesting a focus on outdoor leisure. The landscaping is minimal, with a few flower beds and planters near the house. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the windows are symmetrically arranged on the visible sides. The overall design is functional and contemporary, with an emphasis on open outdoor space and privacy.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, surrounded by a white fence and green lawn, featuring a patio, hot tub, and hammock in the backyard.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entry door, two wall-mounted lights, and a flower bed along the base of the house, with the patio and umbrella visible in the background.
description_view_1: Rear view highlights the backyard amenities, including the hot tub, hammock, and patio umbrella, as well as a large sliding glass door.
description_view_2: Side view displays the symmetrical arrangement of three large windows on the upper floor and the expanse of the white fence enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the hot tub and a clear view of the lawn, with minimal windows and a focus on the fenced boundary.
attribute_entryway_design: Single centered door with wall-mounted lights and a small flower bed, no porch or overhang.
